title: Ore Borders
description: A simple Ore border pack.Makes mining easy.
body:
# Ore Border By Silent!
"Classic Ore Border gives ores a clean outlined look, making them easier to spot while mining. Simple, lightweight, and perfect for Mining."

---

### ⚠️ Compatibility Note
- Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only
- Not Tested with Mods
